text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to encourage motivation and
self-improvement among the Umamusume, the
academy is holding a large-scale scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the day of the event rolls around, Symboli
Rudolf, the head of the organization committee,
looks on with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Spirits are positively stratospheric.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: See for yourself, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf gestures to the track, where the
participating Umamusume are eagerly getting
ready.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Spe! Scrimmage or not, I'll kick your butt!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's what you think! You and everyone else are
gonna eat my dust!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're lookin' pretty pale there, Scarlet. Don't
tell me all the competition's got you nervous?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
As if! I don't care how many racers I have to beat,
I'll prove I'm number one!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is spirited today. They have fire in their
eyes and dreams in their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That fire will lead them to a brighter future. Such
is my constant hope.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And today, my job as student council president is
to stoke those flames.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Which is why I wish to ask you for advice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How can I best encourage them to blaze their own
trails?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah. I suppose the answer was obvious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We Umamusume are born to run. It is the way by
which we show the world our true selves.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well, then. I shall demonstrate to them what
it looks like to have truly mastered body and
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf goes on to wow the crowd and
competition alike with an untouchable
performance in the first race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That... That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That was crazy... but it sure got me fired up!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to thank all of you once again for
gathering here today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: As fellow Umamusume of the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
May we continue to raise one another up as we
strive to pursue our dreams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's inspiring performance lights a
new fire in the hearts of her fellow Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's certainly succeeded in leading by example.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A sound idea. Ideals mean nothing if not spoken
aloud—only once put into words can others look
to them for guidance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I shall give them a speech to remind them of the
future we all strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the opening ceremony, after delivering her
welcoming address and going over a few
guidelines...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Last but not least, I would like to remind you all
of one thing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We all race for the sake of something that we
hold dear.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Something that we each hold deep within
ourselves. Hope, perhaps, or ambition, or even
yearning.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's reason is different, yet equally noble.
And when we take to the track with them in our
hearts...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Those who watch us are inspired to dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf's words resound across the track.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: We... inspire people to dream?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Now I'm fired up!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to thank all of you for attending today. I
hope to see you compete, collaborate, challenge
one another...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And forge a path together toward our shining
future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's worn the mantle of leader well today,
offering an ideal for the others to chase.
